ip_outcome_note: Species name printed on card face; PokemonTCG.io API (swsh3-35) confirms name=Galarian Mr. Mime, nationalPokedexNumbers=[122], Basic (no evolvesFrom in Galar context — evolves from Mime Jr. with Mimic, but card lists as Basic). The depicted pale humanoid figure ice-skating on frozen surface with ice-shard barriers matches canonical Galarian Mr. Mime appearance exactly.

trivia_bullets.text: Galarian Mr. Mime is an Ice/Psychic-type regional variant of the original Kanto Psychic/Fairy Mr. Mime (National Pokedex no. 122), introduced in Pokemon Sword and Shield (2019). The Galarian form drops Fairy typing in favor of Ice, reflecting Galar's cold-climate aesthetic. It evolves into Mr. Rime at level 42 — a Galar-exclusive evolved form with no Kantonian counterpart. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-35; Bulbapedia: Mr. Mime (Galarian Form), via WebSearch snippet]

The Galarian form's tap-dancing identity reflects Galar's UK-inspired cultural register: the original Kantonian Mr. Mime is a pantomime artist, while the Galarian variant adopts tap-dancing — a performance tradition with roots in British clog dancing, Scottish step dancing, and Irish jigs. This is a deliberate design-level localization: the species' defining performance art is recast to fit the region's cultural flavor. [Pokejungle.net: Galarian Mr. Mime and Mr. Rime Origin of Species, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Pokejungle.net: Origin of Species article (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Its talent is tap-dancing. It can also manipulate temperatures to create a floor of ice, which this Pokemon can kick up to use as a barrier." — printed on DAA-035. The barrier mechanic is reflected in the card's Reflect attack (reduces opponent's damage by 30 during the next turn). [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-35]

Art by Misa Tsutsui. DAA-035 and DAA-036 (Galarian Mr. Rime) are adjacent collector numbers — a designer-coordinated pairing encoding the Galar-exclusive evolution line. Both cards share the tap-dancer-on-ice visual register at different performance scales: Mr. Mime at the skating/dance-as-defense register, Mr. Rime at the full music-hall performer register. [PokemonTCG.io API: swsh3-35; swsh3-36]
